content:
**Initial Investment:**
- We are seeking three months of operating costs to get the business started, with the option to renew or reinvest, and pay back at a 25% return on investment. This will be incorporated into the cost with the assumption that the investor will renew every three months.

**Client Acquisition:**
- We aim to offer 1 free trial spot per month, with the goal of signing 8 paying clients in total each month.
- Ad spend will be $5,000 monthly until 10% of the previous month’s revenue exceeds $5,000.

**Staffing Plan:**
- **Virtual Assistants (VAs):** Hire 1 VA for every 7 new clients for client servicing at $25/hour (full-time). Also, hire 1 VA per 100 leads for sales outreach.
- **Replacement of Workload:** The COO will replace initial service and sales workload after reaching 15 clients to focus on expansion.

**Turnover Rate:**
- Account for a 2.5% monthly turnover rate for both free trial and paying clients.

(Continue to the next part for further details on the financial projections and other plan elements.)
